category_sources: source_facts.description: Generates Ktor projects through the command-line interface; official README says Ktor CLI creates Ktor applications.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is Ktor CLI.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents CLI usage and links to ktor.io as the Ktor documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ktorio/ktor-cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README documents generating Ktor apps, OpenAPI project generation, and CLI commands; source_facts.executables lists ktor.
